TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Olah, title = Olah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Olah} }

S.FORM: olah O ciolahay a tamdaw i, o kodaitay, o kalasini'adaay, caay ka 'inap, caay pasneng a misatakaraw ko faloco', caay pakangodo to tamdaw, caay pisatked, caay ka kter, caay pitafo i faloco' to tatiih no tao, caay ka lipahak to tatiihay, o so'linay a dmak ko kalipahakan ningra. Pakahadidi, caay ka lasawad ko pipaso'lin ningra ato pitala ningra ato olah ningra. Caay ka citolas ko olah no mafana'ay to olah no Kawas.
S.PHON: o~u…ĺańß o~u ¶io~u…ĺańßaj a tam…¨~…ģaw i, o~u ko~u…¨~…ģaitaj, o~u ka…ĺasini °a…¨~…ģaaj, ¶aaj ka °inap, ¶aaj pasn…ôŇč a misatakaraw ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, ¶aaj pakaŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~u to~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ¶aaj pisatk…ô…¨~…ģ, ¶aaj ka kt…ôr, ¶aaj pitafo~u i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° to~u tatiińß no~u tao~u, ¶aaj ka …ĺipańßak to~u tatiińßaj, o~u so~u °…ĺinaj a …¨~…ģmak ko~u ka…ĺipańßakan niŇčra. pakańßa…¨~…ģi…¨~…ģi, ¶aaj ka …ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u pipaso~u °…ĺin niŇčra ato~u pita…ĺa niŇčra ato~u o~u…ĺańß niŇčra. ¶aaj ka ¶ito~u…ĺas ko~u o~u…ĺańß no~u mafana °aj to~u o~u…ĺańß no~u kawas.
S.FORM: olah O ciolahay a tamdaw i, o kodaitay, o kalasini'adaay, caay ka 'inap, caay pasneng a misatakaraw ko faloco', caay pakangodo to tamdaw, caay pisatked, caay ka kter, caay pitafo i faloco' to tatiih no tao, caay ka lipahak to tatiihay, o so'linay a dmak ko kalipahakan ningra. Pakahadidi, caay ka lasawad ko pipaso'lin ningra ato pitala ningra ato olah ningra. Caay ka citolas ko olah no mafana'ay to olah no Kawas.
S.PHON: o~u…ĺańß o~u ¶io~u…ĺańßaj a tam…¨~…ģaw i, o~u ko~u…¨~…ģaitaj, o~u ka…ĺasini °a…¨~…ģaaj, ¶aaj ka °inap, ¶aaj pasn…ôŇč a misatakaraw ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, ¶aaj pakaŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~u to~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ¶aaj pisatk…ô…¨~…ģ, ¶aaj ka kt…ôr, ¶aaj pitafo~u i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° to~u tatiińß no~u tao~u, ¶aaj ka …ĺipańßak to~u tatiińßaj, o~u so~u °…ĺinaj a …¨~…ģmak ko~u ka…ĺipańßakan niŇčra. pakańßa…¨~…ģi…¨~…ģi, ¶aaj ka …ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u pipaso~u °…ĺin niŇčra ato~u pita…ĺa niŇčra ato~u o~u…ĺańß niŇčra. ¶aaj ka ¶ito~u…ĺas ko~u o~u…ĺańß no~u mafana °aj to~u o~u…ĺańß no~u kawas.
